TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Madawdaw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,085 buwan, 3,046 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 1,796 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 1,250 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 55%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Madawdaw hya' ga Cirarokohay. tay mkyahu' na Madawdaw hya' ga Ciliksay. tay 'llaw na Madawdaw hya' ga Kalahaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ma*aw*aw …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®irarokońßaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj. taj Ēllaw na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a kalańßaaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Madawdaw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,085 buwan, 3,046 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 1,796 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 1,250 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 55%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Madawdaw hya' ga Cirarokohay. tay mkyahu' na Madawdaw hya' ga Ciliksay. tay 'llaw na Madawdaw hya' ga Kalahaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ma*aw*aw …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®irarokońßaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®iliks~…ēaj. taj Ēllaw na ma*aw*aw ńßja Ē …£a kalańßaaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
